title: Detail Panel — AI Command Center UX
description: Fix dual fit-score confusion, surface cached interview prep, improve visual hierarchy in the detail panel.

userStories.title: Consolidate fit score into single AI Fit section

acceptanceCriteria: Start Research only when no cache
